bindings.timeline_intro: A four-step political timeline for campaign moments, policy changes, or polling shifts.
bindings.event_1_body: Initial figures set the starting point for the comparison and show the first public trend.
bindings.event_2_body: A major proposal changes the issue frame and moves the debate into sharper focus.
bindings.event_3_body: New data shows movement among undecided voters and pressure in key constituencies.
bindings.event_4_body: The final update gives a clear snapshot of how the numbers changed over time.
bindings.bottom_note: Example timeline preview. Dates and details are placeholders for layout review only.
